zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Halsall於1421年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾哈爾薩爾時，她的父親Sir Robert Otis Halsall31歲，母親Catherine De Cowdray27歲。她於1434年與Sir William James Farrington II在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1448年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾法利頓享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Halsall于1421年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾哈爾薩爾时，她的父亲Sir Robert Otis Halsall31岁，母亲Catherine De Cowdray27岁。她于1434年与Sir William James Farrington II在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1448年在英国英格兰藍卡爾法利頓享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Halsall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire named Halsall, from an Old English personal name Hæle + halh ‘nook of land’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Halsall was born in 1421, in Halsall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Otis Halsall, was 31 and her mother, Catherine De Cowdray, was 27. She married Sir William James Farrington II in 1434, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1448, in Farington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Halsall est née en 1421, à Halsall, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Otis Halsall, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Catherine De Cowdray, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William James Farrington II en 1434, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1448, à Farington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Halsall 1421 in Halsall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Otis Halsall 31 und ihre Mutter Catherine De Cowdray 27. Sie hat 1434 in England Sir William James Farrington II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1448 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Farington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Halsall è nata il nel 1421 nel Halsall, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert Otis Halsall, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Catherine De Cowdray, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir William James Farrington II nel 1434, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1448, nel Farington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Halsallが1421年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアハルサルで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Otis Halsallは31歳，母Catherine De Cowdrayは27歳であった。1434年にイギリスでSir William James Farrington IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1448年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアファリントンで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Halsall(이)가 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 할사에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Otis Halsall(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine De Cowdray(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1434년 영국에서 Sir William James Farrington II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1448년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 패링턴에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Halsall nasceu em 1421, em Halsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Otis Halsall, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Catherine De Cowdray, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William James Farrington II em 1434, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1448, em Farington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Halsall родилась в 1421 г. в местности холсалл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Otis Halsall было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine De Cowdray, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William James Farrington II в 1434 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1448 г. в местности фарингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Halsall nació en 1421, en Halsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Otis Halsall, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Catherine De Cowdray, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir William James Farrington II en 1434, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1448, en Farington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 27 años.
